case_title: RONALD LYRELL HAWKINS VS. RICHARD,AVELAR & ASSOC RECONSTRUCTION SERVICES INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TIMOTHY JON STOKES--CORPORATE OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAWKINS, RONALD LYRELL AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD,AVELAR & ASSOC RECONSTRUCTION SERVICES INC (RICHARD,AVELAR & ASSOCIATES RECONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC DBA RECONSTRUCTION SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-11-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
